meaning: v.(使)小跑,(使)快步走,骑马小跑,疾走n.小跑,骑马,疾走,忙碌
examples: Her horse broke into a trot.
The horse slowed to a trot.
The horse started off at a steady trot.
The pink-suited lady follows at a neat trot, her heels click-clacking across the tarmac.
Maybe the growth hound would trot by, pick you out, sniff the goods, paw at you.
